executives.name: Mary Powell
executives.background: Mary Powell has served as our Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since August 2021. Prior to joining Sunrun, Ms. Powell served as the President and Chief Executive Officer of Green Mountain Power Corporation from 2008 to 2019. She has also served on the board of directors of CGI Inc. since 2015 and previously served on the board of directors of Hawaiian Electric Industries, Inc.

executives.name: Danny Abajian
executives.background: Danny Abajian has served as our Chief Financial Officer since May 2022. He previously served as our Senior Vice President, Project Finance from 2016 to 2022 and as Vice President, Project Finance from 2014 to 2016. Prior to joining Sunrun, Mr. Abajian held various roles in investment banking and project finance.

executives.name: Paul Dickson
executives.background: Paul Dickson has served as our Chief Revenue Officer since May 2022. He previously served as our President, Sunrun Direct from 2020 to 2022 and as Senior Vice President, Operations from 2018 to 2020. Mr. Dickson joined Sunrun through the acquisition of Vivint Solar, where he served as Chief Revenue Officer.

executives.name: Jeanna Steele
executives.background: Jeanna Steele has served as our Chief Legal Officer and Chief Compliance Officer since May 2022. She previously served as our General Counsel from 2018 to 2022 and as Deputy General Counsel from 2015 to 2018. Prior to Sunrun, she was an attorney at Wilson Sonsini Goodrich & Rosati.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Legal Officer and Chief Compliance Officer

board_of_directors.name: Edward Fenster
board_of_directors.background: Edward Fenster is one of our co-founders and has served as Executive Chair of our Board since March 2014. He previously served as our Co-Chief Executive Officer from 2008 to 2014. Prior to Sunrun, Mr. Fenster was at Asurion and Blackstone.

board_of_directors.name: Lynn Jurich
board_of_directors.background: Lynn Jurich is one of our co-founders and has served as a member of our Board since 2007. She served as our Chief Executive Officer from 2014 to 2021 and as Co-Chief Executive Officer from 2008 to 2014. She also serves on the board of directors of Endeavor Group Holdings, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Alan Ferber
board_of_directors.background: Alan Ferber has served as a member of our Board since 2018. He previously served as the Chief Executive Officer of TI Automotive and held various executive roles at US Cellular.

board_of_directors.name: Gerald Risk
board_of_directors.background: Gerald Risk has served as a member of our Board since 2014. He is the Vice Chairman of Asurion and previously served as its President.

board_of_directors.name: Katherine August-deWilde
board_of_directors.background: Katherine August-deWilde has served as a member of our Board since 2016. She is the Vice Chair of First Republic Bank and previously served as its President and Chief Operating Officer.

board_of_directors.name: Manavendra Sial
board_of_directors.background: Manavendra Sial has served as a member of our Board since 2022. He is the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Fluence Energy, Inc. and previously served as CFO of SunPower Corporation.
